settings.quote: Smells like roses. Behaves like proper shampoo.

settings.eyebrow: Liquid vs bar — pick your path
settings.title: The shampoo question.
settings.lede: We make both. Both are refillable, both work. They suit different lives. The honest table:
settings.cta2_text: Try a Discovery duo (one of each) →

settings.eyebrow: Liquid lather has its own physics
settings.title: Will it suit your hair?

settings.label: Long & thick
settings.note: Built for this. One pump for fine hair, two for thick. Lather will go further than your last bottle.

settings.label: Curly / coily
settings.note: Co-wash on alternate days; this on the third. Low-poo, high glide.

settings.label: Colour-treated
settings.note: Sulphate-free. Won't strip pigment within 6+ weeks of colour. Salon-tested.

settings.label: Fine & oily roots
settings.note: Lather at the scalp, rinse before mid-lengths. Don't condition the roots.

settings.label: Dandruff-prone
settings.note: Works between flare-ups. For active scalp, alternate with our Clear Skies tonic.

settings.label: Bleached or chemically treated
settings.note: Low pH, conditioning agents protect the cuticle. Pair with the deep treatment.

settings.quote: A rose, but standing too close to a bonfire.
settings.body: We distil Bulgarian damask roses in spring, then age the distillate in oak barrels for eight weeks. The wood lends phenolic depth — the kind of "smoke" your nose registers without flames. Wash your hair with this, and you carry a 200-year-old French perfumery technique into the office.

settings.name: Damask Rose Distillate
settings.story: Steam-distilled from Bulgarian damask rose, then aged 8 weeks in oak. The "smoked" comes from the wood — phenolic compounds give the rose a velvety, slightly burnt edge.

settings.name: Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate
settings.story: A coconut-derived sulphate-free cleanser. Foams properly, rinses cleaner than bars, won't strip dyed hair. The reason this shampoo doesn't feel like a compromise.

settings.name: Argan Oil + Panthenol
settings.story: Argan smooths the cuticle while you wash; panthenol (vitamin B5) penetrates the strand for next-day softness. No silicone build-up to clarify.

settings.heading: Bring it back
settings.body: Bottle empty? In to our Orchard flagship. Or order a pouch online.

settings.heading: We weigh, wash, refill
settings.body: Watch the pour at the counter. 4 minutes door-to-door.

settings.heading: Pay 60% less
settings.body: S$22 for 300ml refill. Save S$10 every time. The bottle works forever.

settings.heading: Earn 50 coins
settings.body: Per refill returned. Stacks toward your next discovery set.

settings.eyebrow: A wash from start to drain
settings.title: The rose ritual.
settings.promise_text: No clarifying needed, ever. The slip comes from argan and panthenol, not cyclomethicone — so nothing accumulates on the strand.

settings.heading: Drench
settings.body: Soak hair until water-heavy. The shampoo doesn't lather without it.

settings.heading: Pump
settings.body: One full pump for shoulder-length, two for longer. Less, not more.

settings.heading: Lather scalp
settings.body: Massage the roots only. Mid-lengths get the runoff. Caffeine + smoke do the work.

settings.heading: Rinse
settings.body: Lukewarm. Let the suds run through the lengths on their way out.

settings.heading: Repeat?
settings.body: Wash 1 only on a normal day. Wash 2 if you've oiled or it's post-gym.
Refill maths. Cheaper than your morning kopi.
At one pump, twice a week. Heavy users get ~25.
Per litre vs single-use bottle. Pouches are aluminium and recyclable.

settings.q: How is this different from the Java Jungle bar?
settings.a: See the comparison table above. Short version: liquid for thick / coloured / long hair, bar for short / travel / minimalist routines. Both refill, both work, neither is "better."

settings.q: Will it work on bleached hair?
settings.a: Yes — sulphate-free, low pH (4.8), no harsh actives. Salon-tested post-bleach. Expect noticeably softer day-three hair.
Yes. The slip you feel is argan oil + panthenol penetrating the strand, not silicone coating it. Means no clarifying, ever.
Most heads do well on every-other-day. Daily if you sweat or oil; every-third-day if your hair is fine and dry. Listen to your scalp.

Aqua, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Panthenol, Rosa Damascena (Damask Rose) Distillate (oak-aged), Hydrolyzed Quinoa Protein, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Tocopherol, Parfum (Smoked Roses accord), Limonene, Linalool, Geraniol. Sulphate-free, silicone-free, palm-oil-free.

settings.q: Can I buy a refill without owning the bottle yet?
settings.a: Sure. The 500ml pouch comes with a free pump head — just decant into any clean bottle you have. Or grab the bottle next time.
